name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
PriceSentinel monitors Binance spot prices and pings you when a coin hits your rules.

• Manage Watchlist — add or remove coins
• Set Alert — threshold or percent-move rules
• View Summary — top movers + recent alerts
• /price BTC — quick price check (or /price for your whole list)

Tap /start anytime to open the menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
